column8: Betty said to Lucy, "I'm sorry to disturb you."
column9: Dan said, "I've missed my bus, I'll be late and my boss will be furious."
column10: The girl said to her friends, "I didn't go to the stadium yesterday."
column11: My brother said, "I'm talking on the phone."
column12: Nora says to Jack, "I'll tell you what to do."
column13: Lora said, "I wish I had something to eat."
column14: Bill said, "I've been ill for a fortnight."
column15: She said, "I've never set eyes on him in my life."
column16: He said, "Bill wants to know if you are free tomorrow."
column17: Jane says, "When the doorbell rang I was playing the violin."
